title: Longest Common Prefix
description:
Write a function to find the longest common prefix string amongst an array of
strings `strs`. If there is no common prefix, return an empty string `""`.
constraints: strs[i] consists of lowercase English letters.

solutions.summary: Start with the first word and trim it until it prefixes every string.

steps.title: Guess the first word as the prefix
steps.explanation: The answer can be no longer than the first string, so start there.

steps.title: Trim until every word matches
steps.explanation: For each later word, chop the last character off `prefix` until the word starts with it.
